property.name: text2
property.value: * That radiant, [wait:5][color:9999ff]Dark Shard,[color:white][wait:5] a gift from the heavens themselves.

property.name: text3
property.value: * Yet the further I walked toward it,[wait:5] the more it seemed to slip away.

property.name: text4
property.value: * And now,[wait:5] I stand at this hollow intersection, [wait:5]a traveler who outran his destination.
